## Problem Statement
<!-- What problem or use case does this feature solve? Describe in clear, concise terms. -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- How do you envision this feature working? Be specific and detailed. -->

## Desired Behavior
<!-- Describe how you would like to use this feature in your election system. -->

## Example Use Cases
<!-- Real-world scenarios where this feature would be helpful. At least one example. -->
- 
- 

## Alternative Approaches
<!-- Are there other ways to solve this problem? What are the trade-offs? -->

## Impact
- **Scope:** (Core system / Voting method / Documentation / UI / Other)
- **Complexity:** (Low / Medium / High)
- **Breaking Changes?** (Yes / No)

## Additional Context
<!-- Any other information that would help evaluate this request -->

## Related Issues
<!-- Links to related issues or discussions -->
